title: dryopteris thomassetii
intro: Dryopteris thomassetii is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family, commonly known as the wood fern. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation. The plant contains compounds that have been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving gut health. Dryopteris thomassetii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and some herbal practitioners also use it in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal properties.
